Class Object

java.lang.Object
com.surrealdb.Native
com.surrealdb.Object
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<Entry>
public class Object extends Native implements Iterable<Entry>
The Object class implements the Iterable interface for Entry objects. It provides methods for object manipulation and interaction.
